intro: Stisseria verrucosa, also known as the rough Stisseria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including the ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. The bioactive constituents of Stisseria verrucosa include alkaloids, which have been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The most common herbal preparations made from this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote respiratory health and relieve coughs.
